title: Stop the API racing the database at startup
description:
# Issue #224 - 'connection refused' on every deploy

Every deploy the web container starts before Postgres is ready and crash-loops with 'connection refused'. depends_on in starter/docker-compose.yml only waits for the container to START, not for the database to be READY. The db image is also unpinned.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- the db service defines a healthcheck (pg_isready) with an interval and retries
- web uses the long-form depends_on with condition: service_healthy
- the postgres image is pinned to a specific tag (no :latest)
- both services have a restart policy (unless-stopped or always)
optimal_hint: Ideal: db healthcheck test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -U app'] with interval/timeout/retries, web depends_on: {db: {condition: service_healthy}}, postgres pinned (e.g. postgres:16-alpine), restart: unless-stopped on both. Watch for students who add a sleep in the web command instead.
